summary: Dashboard successfully implements empty state with proper onboarding CTA and accurate usage metrics. Minor palette inconsistency with cream background instead of specified teal for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Dashboard uses cream/neutral background instead of maintaining brand palette consistency with public surfaces. Authenticated UI should share coherent brand palette with public routes.

actions: Consider applying consistent brand palette treatment to authenticated surfaces
Verify that the cream background choice aligns with overall brand palette strategy
Ensure visual continuity between public and authenticated experiences
